summary: White House clip of a Trump TrumpRx.gov speech with branded caption cards, a headline overlay ('We Now Pay The Lowest Price Paid For Anybody in Any Country'), subtitles, and a 'TEXT POTUS TO 45470' banner. It is a lightly-graphics-wrapped speech excerpt, not a music-driven cinematic montage, so it falls outside youth-appeal produced content.
notable_text: President Trump on TrumpRX; "We Now Pay The Lowest Price Paid For Anybody in Any Country"; TEXT "POTUS" TO 45470 FOR UPDATES FROM THE WHITE HOUSE; The WHITE HOUSE
